title: Guest Access to Dashboard ONLY
excerpt:

posts.author: TyeZ (Tye Zaharia)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m pretty furious right now that I have to post this as a feature request/ feedback. I shouldn’t have to and was assured that what I needed was doable.

Up until now I have been told that it is possible for Guests to view Dashboards without having access to the Workspace Boards.

This is not the case. Guests can ONLY view the Dashboard data being pulled from Workspace Boards if it is being shared with the Guests in the first place. This gives them access to the Workspace Board.

This defeats the purpose of sharing a dashboard with a guest. If I can only share a dashboard that does not have the data being pulled from the workspace board, then I’m sharing either empty space or non-essential data placed in the Dashboard directly.

I request that this function be made available as it is a straight forward and simple feature. Here is how you would do it.

In the basic language of programming this should be possible:
“IF data from WORKSPACE BOARD is shared to DASHBOARD, THEN modify data to be shared through widgets/ apps.”

If I have data from the calendar widget pulling from a Workspace Board, then that data coming through should be accessible to the guest without access to the Workspace Board itself.

Please, please make this change. Preferably in the next 24 hours if possible. I really don’t want to have to cancel the pro plan and start looking for other PM options. Thank you

posts.author: Cornelia (Cornelia Moser)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this urgently too - just as TyeZ has written. I do not want to show the guest the whole database - only the result of it. Are there any news?

posts.author: Carrie (Carrie Downey)
posts.cookedHtml: @TyeZ & @Cornelia I really need this ability too. Additionally, I want to make my Dashboard link available to clients through an automated email upon receipt of payment. Do you know if the dashboard link gives them “view only” capabilities or more access to engage with the board as a formal invitation to the board would provide? I need the later but if I have to manually type in their email to send an invitation then it will defeat the benefits of my whole automated workflow.

posts.author: ENies (Emily Nies)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any work being done with this? I see this request is many years old and we are still having to share a board to make the dashboard visible

posts.author: Daniel_Ellis (Daniel Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml: This is critical feature for guest. To the extent we are considering other platform if this isn’t built in the near future.

posts.author: Cpa (ChristopherPalm)
posts.cookedHtml:
This need to be bumbed. The whole point of the platform is to inform stakeholders about the progress of our project. This is best done via dashboards.

Is there any other way I can report the progress in a simular way? some sort of workaround?

posts.author: AndrewJones (Andrew Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Completely agree. Really want to be able to use our boards to generate reports and views for the wider business without having to extend access to the data itself.
